Home VAT Age Mortgage

About

Built for Everyone Who Needs a Quick Answer

CalcHub is a simple idea: when you need a number, you shouldn’t have to fight popups, slow pages, and confusing tools. We build fast, clean calculators that work beautifully on mobile — and stay free forever.

Our Mission

Online calculators are often slow, full of ads, confusing, and not mobile friendly. You click “calculate” and suddenly you’re scrolling through banners, cookie popups, and pages that feel like they were built for everything except helping you.

CalcHub’s goal is the opposite: fast, clean, accurate, and free forever. No sign-up. No ads. No nonsense.

Super Fast

Every calculator loads in under 1 second. No heavy software, no bloat.

100% Private

All calculations happen in your browser. We never see your numbers.

Works Everywhere

Fully optimised for mobile, tablet and desktop. Use it anywhere, anytime.

Accuracy Commitment

Every formula is verified against official sources and standard references whenever possible. We also test calculators with known examples to make sure the results match expectations.

If you ever spot something that looks off, we genuinely want to hear from you. Accuracy is a promise — and we take it seriously.

Contact

Email us anytime at hello@calchub.com. Want a new calculator? Suggest a calculator and we’ll add it to the roadmap.
